commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: The Bride now turns and addresses her words to the daughters of Jerusalem on high. What she utters is an exhortation, stated with an oath, always to increase and multipy love. (St. Gregory of Nyssa)

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: I. The bridegroom (Calmet) speaks as chap. ii. 7., (Worthington) and chap. viii. 4. He retires early.
